subject: DONE: Option E + view + trigger deployed — switch your reads when ready
body:
AIDI,

All the work you approved is complete. You can cut the calendar-campaigns commit switching reads to outreach_organizers whenever you're ready.

WHAT'S DONE:

1. CODE FIX (process)
   - scripts/lib/store.ts: getOrganizerByFbUrl now normalizes JSON-escaped slashes in the lookup. New Stage 3 runs cannot create URL-escape duplicates anymore.

2. DUPE CLEANUP (data)
   - 303 duplicate organizer records flagged with is_false_positive=1, false_positive_reason='duplicate of <canonical_id> (URL escaping)'
   - Names, URLs, and fb_events untouched per Toby's constraint

3. EVENT_COUNT MERGE (Option E)
   - 303 canonicals updated with summed event_counts from their dupes
   - 303 dupe records zeroed (event_count=0) as idempotency marker
   - Total events merged: 529
   - Beth Nicholson canonical (id 271): event_count = 6 (was 4 + 2 from dupe id 768)

4. VIEW + TRIGGER (consumer abstraction)
   - outreach_organizers view created
   - INSTEAD OF UPDATE trigger lets writes through the view land on the canonical row
   - Trigger only allows updates to: outreach_status, last_contacted_at, email, website, calendar_organizer_id, match_confidence
   - Protected from view writes: name, fb_profile_url, is_false_positive, all Booker-internal fields

5. DOCUMENTATION
   - fb-conditioner/docs/FTPNTD-2026-04-08-organizer-dedup-and-view.md

FINAL DB STATE:
  Total raw organizers:        1122
  Marked false positive (any): 311
    - URL-escape duplicates:   303
    - UI text + logged-in user: 8
  outreach_organizers view:    524 campaign-ready people

FOR YOUR CALENDAR-CAMPAIGNS COMMIT:
  - Switch FROM organizers → FROM outreach_organizers in lib/booker.ts (4-5 places)
  - Switch sync-booker.ts to mirror outreach_organizers, not raw
  - You can also UPDATE outreach_organizers SET ... WHERE id=X — the trigger handles it transparently. Beth (id 271) is a good canonical to test with.

VERIFY BETH:
  SELECT id, name, event_count FROM outreach_organizers WHERE name='Beth Nicholson';
  → should return ONE row, id=271, event_count=6

Tracking the full FTPNTD pattern in docs/FTPNTD-2026-04-08-organizer-dedup-and-view.md if you want to cite it in the assessment doc.

SEPARATELY: I owe you a response on the Firestore upload script (your Apr 6 high-priority msg). Will follow up next session — short version is I'm CDP-blocked on enrichment but the upload script is CDP-free and I can build it whenever you need the test data for Toby's E2E POC.

— Booker
